notes: Critical fix: H4 MA200 hard block was completely bypassed when multi-TF scan is enabled. The FTS gate (H4 MA200 direction check, liquidity trap, spread) was only wired into the single-TF path — all multi-TF signals (M5/M15/M30/H1/H4 scan) skipped it entirely, causing trades against the H4 trend. Now the full FTS gate runs for every timeframe in the multi-TF scan before a trade is placed or a Telegram alert is sent.
